content:
# Forward Modeling

**Summary**: Calculating the gravity response of a known geological model to match observed data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-hanif|Hanif, 2018]] applied forward modeling to determine the density distribution in karstified zones.

- [[2022-aljishi|AlJishi, 2022]] used forward modeling to generate synthetic data for validating the proposed sand curve adjustment.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2022-aljishi|AlJishi, 2022]] used forward modeling to generate synthetic data for validating the proposed sand curve adjustment.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The forward modeling achieved a total misfit of 0.5 mGal for the identified karstified region. ([[2018-hanif|Hanif, 2018, p. 75]])

- Forward modeling was used to simulate various scenarios including different sand thicknesses and velocities to test the robustness of the algorithm. ([[2022-aljishi|AlJishi, 2022, p. 33]])
